recommendations.title: Heartbeats
recommendations.overview: When a bubbly American hip hop dancer goes to India with her family for a wedding, she is impressed by a new dance style and falls in love with the man who introduced her to it.

recommendations.title: Paper Planes
recommendations.overview: Dylan discovers he has a talent for making paper planes. He has a chance to compete in a world championship, but he'll have to face bullies and self-doubt to do so.

recommendations.title: This Is England
recommendations.overview: A story about a troubled boy growing up in England, set in 1983. He comes across a few skinheads on his way home from school, after a fight. They become his new best friends, even like family. Based on experiences of director Shane Meadows.

recommendations.title: Dance-Off
recommendations.overview: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

recommendations.title: Glory Road
recommendations.overview: In 1966, Texas Western coach Don Haskins led the first all-black starting line-up for a college basketball team to the NCAA national championship.

recommendations.title: Kai Po Che!
recommendations.overview: Three friends growing up in India at the turn of the millennium set out to open a training academy to produce the country's next cricket stars.

recommendations.title: The Marquez-Castillo Siblings
recommendations.overview: A group of four siblings compete for the heritage of their father.

recommendations.title: Pad Man
recommendations.overview: Upon realizing the extent to which women are affected by their menses, a man sets out to create a sanitary pad machine and to provide inexpensive sanitary pads to the women of rural India.

recommendations.title: The Cheetah Girls: One World
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Drama, Music, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Chanel, Dorinda, and Aqua are off to India to star in a Bollywood movie. But when they discover that they will have to compete against each other to get the role in the movie, will the Cheetahs break up again?

recommendations.title: Swing Vote
recommendations.overview: In a remarkable turn of events, the result of the presidential election comes down to one man's vote.
